Implemented: pyproject.toml with full locked stack, uv.lock pinned, directory layout (generator/{model,formatters,golds}/, tests/, scoring/, templates/, shared_data/, test_cases/, gold_standards/), ruff+pytest configured. All acceptance criteria pass: uv sync, ruff check, pytest all exit 0.

Implemented: config.yaml with full company params (subs, growth rates, margins, intercompany, seasonal weights, employee config, canary/error placeholders) + generator/config.py typed loader with dataclasses and validation + 13 tests (7 happy path, 6 error path). All tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/entities.py: frozen Entity dataclass with code/name/location/state/revenue_target/gross_margin/revenue_mix/is_parent fields. Constants for parent (CI) + 3 subsidiaries (PC, AM, DS) sourced from prompt.md §1.1-1.2. Exports ENTITIES dict (all 4 by code) and SUBSIDIARIES dict (3 subs only). Ruff clean, pytest green, import-level assertions verified.

Implemented generate_test_suite.py with argparse (--config, --output), config loading, PRNG seeding (random/numpy/faker), and directory tree creation matching prompt.md §2.3. Tests verify tree structure and idempotency. CLI exits 0.

Implemented tests/test_determinism.py with 3 tests: (1) in-process dual-run diff, (2) subprocess dual-run diff catching module-level side effects, (3) PDF-specific byte-identity test that auto-activates when PDF formatters land. All pass on current skeleton generator.

Implemented generator/model/coa.py: Account dataclass + AccountType/NormalBalance enums + 120 accounts (1xxx–9xxx) with granular R&D (6300–6370 for TC-08), ASC 842 lease accounts (1600–1630, 2300–2330 for TC-04), matched IC pairs (9xxx), tax provision accounts (8xxx for TC-06). validate_coa() checks uniqueness, prefix-type consistency, and IC pair completeness. 11 dedicated tests in tests/test_coa.py, all passing.

Implemented generator/model/gl.py: JournalEntryLine and JournalEntry frozen dataclasses with Decimal amounts, Ledger class with post() (validates balanced entries + COA membership), balance_by_account(entity, as_of_date), filter_by_date_range, filter_by_entity, account_detail. 16 tests in tests/test_gl.py covering balanced/unbalanced posting, invalid accounts, all query methods with date and entity filters. All 46 project tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/canaries.py: deterministic 8-char canary generator (isolated RNG from seed), CanaryRegistry dataclass with JSON emitter (sorted keys), and embedding helpers for xlsx (doc properties), docx (core properties), reportlab PDF (Author), fpdf2 PDF (Subject), and CSV (comment line). 16 unit tests verify uniqueness, determinism, format, serialisation, and findability in each file type.

Implemented generator/model/revenue.py with 6 product lines across 3 entities. Entity-level FY24 targets calibrated so consolidated FY24→25 growth = 9.2% (TC-03 gold). Specialty Coatings declines 4%, Advanced Composites drives growth at ~45%. COGS at 35%/52%/18% margins. Monthly seasonal weights (Q4 heavy). GL posting via ledger.post(). 25 new tests in tests/test_revenue.py covering totals, growth rates, margins, seasonality, GL posting, and determinism. All 87 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/employees.py: 850 employees across CI(40)/PC(330)/AM(270)/DS(210), 108 R&D-eligible at AM (R&D+Engineering), ~22% terminated (compound 8%/yr over 3yr tenure), seeded Faker names, location-adjusted salaries, 4-digit cost centers. 13 tests pass including determinism.

Implemented generator/errors.py: PlantedError dataclass, ErrorRegistry with add/get/by_file/by_type/by_test_case/JSON serialization, and 9 transformation functions (transpose_digits, mismatch_total, stale_data, formula_error, wrong_entity, date_inconsistency, classification_error, missing_data, rounding_discrepancy). 33 unit tests in tests/test_errors.py covering all error types, registry operations, validation, edge cases, and deterministic JSON output.

Implemented generator/model/opex.py (SG&A, payroll from roster, R&D at ~12% of AM revenue, SBC) and generator/model/ppe.py (fixed asset register with book straight-line and MACRS tax depreciation, cumulative book-tax difference queryable view for TC-06). All 148 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/bank.py: 340 bank transactions for Dec 2025 with matching GL cash detail. 4 outstanding checks (,450), 2 deposits in transit (,664), bank interest (,567) and charges (). Gold standard: adjusted bank/book balance = $4,287,331, confirmation = $4,312,117. 19 tests in test_bank.py covering constants, generation, reconciliation validation, and determinism. All 167 project tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/intercompany.py with all 4 IC transaction types (goods cost-plus-8%, warehouse services, mgmt fees 1.5%, IC loan interest 5%). Added 9070/9080 (parent IC recv/pay) and 9160/9170 (IC services) to COA. 15 tests verify consolidation elimination (all 9xxx net to zero), revenue/expense pair elimination, loan principal elimination, and mgmt fee accuracy. Bumped COA test bound from 140→150.

Implemented generator/model/ar.py + ap.py. AR: 26 customers across 3 entities with DSO 30-120, aging by bucket (current/30/60/90/120+), monthly collections posted to GL (DR 1010, CR 1100), bad debt allowance with reserve rates. AP: 26 vendors with payment terms Net 15-60, aging by bucket, monthly purchase/payment flows posted to GL (DR 1220/CR 2010 + DR 2010/CR 1010). Acceptance criteria verified: AR aging totals = GL 1100 balance and AP aging totals = GL 2010 balance for all 3 entities. 29 new tests, all 211 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/leases.py: 15 leases across CI/PC/AM/DS with lessee/lessor, terms, escalation (fixed%, CPI, stepped, none), renewal/purchase options, termination provisions. 2 short-term exempt (LS-009=10mo, LS-013=9mo), 3 with material amendments (LS-002 warehouse expansion, LS-007 clean room conversion, LS-010 footprint reduction), 2 finance leases with purchase options. Full ASC 842 computations: PV of payments, ROU asset/liability, operating straight-line expense, finance amortisation+interest. asc842_temp_difference() exposed for TC-06. GL posting engine for initial recognition + annual entries. 20 tests pass including determinism.

Implemented consolidation engine (generator/model/consolidation.py) with IC eliminations. Provides consolidated trial balance, balance sheet, income statement, and cash flow (indirect method). All acceptance criteria pass: IC 9xxx accounts net to zero, BS balances for all 3 years, FY2025 consolidated revenue = $200M (in $198-202M range). 11 tests in test_consolidation.py.

Implemented generator/model/tax.py with full ASC 740 provision: permanent diffs (M&E 50%, tax-exempt interest, SBC excess, fines), temporary diffs (depreciation MACRS vs SL, ASC 842, warranty/inventory/bonus/bad debt reserves), DTA/DTL rollforward, federal 21% + state 6.2%, R&D credit, ETR reconciliation, GL posting, validation. 11 tests in test_tax.py, all 253 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/views.py with 4 pure functions: entity_trial_balance (per-entity TB), all_entity_trial_balances (all entities), monthly_pnl (12-month account-level P&L), monthly_pnl_summary (12-month category summary). Re-exports consolidated BS/IS/CF from consolidation.py so formatters import from one place. 12 tests verify: entity TBs balance to zero, consolidated TB = sum of entities, monthly P&L aggregates match annual IS, revenue positive every month, math consistency.

Implemented generator/golds/framework.py: GoldStandard dataclass with to_dict/from_dict, @register_gold decorator for per-TC functions, emit_gold/emit_all_golds emitters writing TC-XX_gold.json, read_gold_json reader, verify_round_trip self-test, and _sort_recursive for deterministic key ordering. 17 tests in test_gold_framework.py covering dataclass serialization, registration, emission, round-trip, and model kwargs forwarding. All 282 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented: generator/model/rd.py with 12 R&D projects (8 qualify, 2 borderline, 2 non-qualifying), weekly time records for 45 R&D-eligible employees (2,340 rows with qualifying/overhead split), supply expenses, and QRE computation. ASC credit hits ~$185K target. 16 tests in tests/test_rd.py, all 298 suite tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/manifest.py: Manifest context manager with register(), size resolution, deterministic JSON output. Integrated into generate_test_suite.py — generate() now returns Manifest and writes manifest.json. 6 tests added covering registration, context manager, exception safety, size resolution, orchestrator integration, and determinism.

Implemented generator/model/ap_ledger.py: 52K-row AP transaction ledger with all 7 anomaly categories (16 exact/near duplicates totaling $127,340 exposure, 35 Benford violations $9,900-$9,999, 12 round-number payments to Pacific Consulting Group, 15 weekend/holiday + 8 invoice-after-payment, JKL LLC/Inc similar-name vendors + PC-0342 employee-address vendor, 3 split transaction sets, 1 self-approved + 40-txn single-approver cost center). 24 tests in tests/test_ap_ledger.py. All 328 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented generator/model/k1.py: 8 K-1 investments with box 1-13 + Box 20 codes, amounts $5K-$2.3M, one amended (ordinary income 340K→285K, +$55K guaranteed payment), Section 199A present but N/A to C-corp, consolidated_totals() helper. 16 tests pass.

Implemented generator/formatters/templates.py with emit_templates() producing both files: deliverable_cover_page.docx (branded cover with {{REPORT_TITLE}}, {{CLIENT_NAME}}, {{DATE}}, {{PREPARED_BY}} placeholders + canary) and formatting_guide.pdf (2-page text-native PDF with section order, page numbering rules, header/footer specs, font standards, table formatting). Both files deterministic, canaries embedded, ruff clean, 344 tests pass.

Implemented: templates/workpaper_memo_template.docx with 5 firm-standard sections (Objective, Scope, Procedures, Findings, Conclusion), header/footer with merge fields (ENGAGEMENT_NAME, FISCAL_YEAR, FIRM_NAME), meta table, signature block, navy Calibri branding. 15 merge fields total. python-docx reads all sections. Generator script in scripts/create_workpaper_memo_template.py.

Implemented generator/model/customers.py with: 8 customer contracts (Acme has change-of-control clause), customer concentration analysis (top customer Acme = 18% consolidated), 3 key personnel agreements (CEO golden parachute 3× salary = K, CFO 2×, CTO 2×), pending litigation (.5M product liability), and data room red flags aggregator. 23 new tests in tests/test_customers.py, all 367 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented TC-01 formatter: messy FY2025 client TB (merged cells, abbreviations, renamed accounts, ERR-001 transposed digit), clean FY2024 workpaper, signed FY2024 financials PDF, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard JSON. Wired model builder (build.py), canary/error registries, and gold emission into orchestrator. Deterministic xlsx saves via pinned timestamps and zip re-pack. All 367 tests pass, ruff clean, determinism verified.

Implemented scoring/rubrics.yaml: 5 dimensions × 18 test cases with concrete 3/2/1 score anchors referencing gold standard values. YAML loads cleanly, every TC has all 5 dimensions, every dimension has 3/2/1 anchors. Each TC includes metadata (title, service_line, difficulty, capabilities).

Implemented scoring/auto_grader.py with TestCaseGrader class (5 dimensions: correctness, completeness, format, canaries, error_detection). SelfTestGrader subclass for --self-test mode. CLI supports single TC, all TCs, and self-test. Self-test against generated TC-01 gold standard passes 3/3/3/3/3. All 367 existing tests pass, ruff clean.

Created templates/engagement_letter_template.docx with all 6 merge fields (<<client_name>>, <<engagement_scope>>, <<fee_amount>>, <<payment_terms>>, <<start_date>>, <<partner_name>>). Standard engagement letter with firm letterhead, sections for scope/fees/period/responsibilities/confidentiality/liability/acceptance. Verified python-docx can enumerate all fields. Script at scripts/create_engagement_letter_template.py for provenance.

Implemented TC-05 formatter: emits ar_aging_fy2025.xlsx, ar_confirmations_summary.xlsx, allowance_analysis.xlsx, workpaper_memo_template.docx (canary-embedded copy), prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, and TC-05_gold.json. All 367 tests pass, ruff clean, determinism verified.

Implemented TC-06 formatter: consolidated TB, prior year provision workpaper (with ERR-006 stale state rate), perm/temp differences docx, statutory rates docx, prompt, expected_behavior, and gold standard. Also wired employees, opex, PPE, leases, and tax provisions into CascadeModel/build_model().

Implemented TC-07 formatter: 8 K-1 PDFs (3 clean/5 varying layouts), entity org chart PDF, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. Determinism verified. No planted errors — adversarial signal is layout diversity + amended K-1 + Section 199A C-corp trap.

Implemented TC-02 formatter: bank CSV (340 txns), GL cash xlsx, bank confirmation PDF, prompt/expected_behavior, gold standard. Fixed bank model balancing adjustment to spread across inflows (prevents negative amounts). Wired BankModel into CascadeModel. All tests pass, deterministic, lint clean.

Implemented TC-04 formatter: 15 lease PDFs (10 text-native, 3 scanned-style with OCR traps, 2 with amendment pages), partial lease schedule xlsx (8/15 populated, 3 with blank fields), ERR-007 date_inconsistency planted, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. Determinism verified.

Implemented TC-03 formatter: revenue XLSX (24mo × 6 product lines with volumes/ASPs), 12-page industry benchmark PDF (benchmarks on pp. 4/7/11), management rep letter DOCX (~8% claim vs 9.2% actual), prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. Determinism verified.

Implemented TC-18 formatter: 10 prior-year workpapers (6 xlsx, 4 docx), 5 current-year data files (2 CSV, 2 xlsx, 1 docx), prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, and gold standard. Adversarial elements: CSV format change for TB, docx format change for projections, new goodwill impairment file, planning memo flagged for substantive rewrite.

Implemented TC-17 formatter: 6 workpaper sections (4 docx + 2 xlsx), template copying, prompt/expected_behavior, gold standard. Also wired emit_templates into orchestrator and fixed cover page determinism.

Implemented TC-15 DCF valuation formatter: 4 input files (historical_financials_3yr.xlsx, management_projections.xlsx, comparable_companies_trading.xlsx, industry_overview.pdf), prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. WACC 10.8%, EV Gordon $268M (range $245-305M), EV Exit $314M (range $260-320M). 200bps margin expansion flag wired. Deterministic. All 367 tests pass.

Implemented TC-11 QofE formatter: monthly P&L xlsx (36 months, line-item detail, EBITDA≈$28.4M), management adjustments xlsx (6 adj totalling $1.855M with 2 traps), 8 customer contract PDFs, management interview notes docx, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. Planted ERR-011 (classification_error: recurring consulting fees misclassified as non-recurring). Determinism verified.

Implemented: 32-file data room + 65-item DD checklist + prompt.md + expected_behavior.md + gold standard. All 6 red flags embedded (litigation, CEO golden parachute, Acme CoC clause, 2 expiring patents, incomplete IP assignments, missing environmental/regulatory docs). 34 canary keys. No planted ERR-xxx errors. Determinism verified.
Implemented TC-13 formatter: 52K-row AP CSV with 7 anomaly categories, canary, prompt, expected_behavior, and gold standard. All tests pass, determinism verified.

Implemented TC-08 formatter: CSV time records, 12 project description docx, payroll xlsx, supply expenses xlsx, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. Credit=,999.97 (within  of K target). All tests pass, deterministic, lint clean.

Implemented TC-09 transfer pricing formatter: IC transactions xlsx, 12 comparable companies xlsx (10 accepted, 2 rejected → IQR 4.2%-8.7%), 42-page prior year TP report PDF, prompt, expected behavior, and gold standard. All deterministic, all tests pass.

Implemented TC-10 formatter: consolidated P&L xlsx, state factors xlsx (OR/TX/IL complete, CA/WA partial, NY blank with /bin/zsh vs blank distinction), apportionment rules docx, prompt, expected behavior, and gold standard. No planted errors. Determinism verified.

Implemented TC-14 formatter: wired into generate_test_suite.py (import, canary keys, emit call). Re-engineered weekly AR/AP/expense arrays to produce exact gold standard trough values: base Week 8 $1,340,000, deferred $2,155,000, sensitivity $780,000. Marketing $168,750/wk + Training $35,000/wk (deferral $203,750/wk × 4 = $815,000). All 367 tests pass, determinism verified.
Implemented TC-16 formatter: client_profile.docx, fee_schedule.xlsx, engagement_letter_template.docx copy, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, gold standard. All tests pass, linter clean, deterministic.

Implemented: quality gate test verifying all 143 canaries are findable in their generated files (xlsx properties, docx comments, pdf bytes, csv text). 4 tests: registry exists, all entries have file_path, all files exist on disk, every canary findable.

Fixed two issues: (1) TC-07 gold emitter now only includes non-None section_199a fields (wages/ubia), consistent with the boxes pattern. K1-002 has no wages, so it was emitting null which the grader misinterpreted as missing. (2) Grader _compare_recursive now uses 'key in actual' to distinguish absent keys from present-but-None keys.
Implemented tests/test_file_integrity.py: opens every xlsx/docx/pdf/csv/json from manifest.json with native libraries, catches corrupt files. All 8 tests pass.

Implemented tests/test_errors.py quality gate: TestErrorQualityGate with 7 tests — registry existence, non-empty, target count (25), unique IDs, valid types, file existence, and per-error content verification. All pass except test_target_count (4/25 errors planted — tracked in synth-data-4ty).
Planted all 25 errors (ERR-001..ERR-025) with exact type distribution per prompt.md §1.7. All quality gate tests pass including test_target_count, test_every_error_verifiable, and determinism.

Generated scoring/scoring_template.xlsx with 4 sheets (Scorecard, Grader Instructions, Inter-Rater Agreement, Aggregate Dashboard) per §7.3. Deterministic output via pinned ZIP timestamps. All 386 tests pass.
